content.headline: How We Helped TechCorp Improve Team Performance 40%
content.body:
TechCorp faced a challenge: scattered leadership efforts with unclear ROI. Here's how we helped:

[CLM_032] - Action ranking considers expected ROI and feasibility to avoid initiative overload.

[CLM_040] - Combining QWL with RL policy learning helps teams converge on fewer, higher-leverage actions.

The result? 40% improvement in team performance metrics within 6 months.
